title: Technology in My Life: Today and Tomorrow
title_en: Technology in My Life: Today and Tomorrow
objectives: Produce a two-paragraph report comparing technology now and in the future
Apply appropriate linkers to connect ideas clearly in a report

key_concepts.explanation: Now (N): People use tablets to study and do homework. A parent buys groceries online using a phone app. People use smartwatches to check the time and their health. Future (F): Robots will help with cooking and daily work. Memory-recording glasses will save special memories. Weather-control drones will keep cities cool. Families will live in smart homes and robots will help with daily work.
Nowadays and in the future are time linkers — use them to show when something happens. Use the present simple for Now (N). Use will + base verb for In the Future (F).

Fill-in model: '___ (Nowadays), technology is a big part of our everyday life. People use it to study, work, and shop online. ___ (For example), students attend virtual classes and families buy groceries using apps. ___ (As a result), many tasks are faster and easier than before. ___ (However/In the future), robots and AI will help people at home and make cities smarter. ___ (As a result), people should still use technology carefully and not depend on it too much.'

exercises.problem: Read and Sort (N for Now / F for In the Future): 1. People use tablets to study and do homework. 2. Robots will help with cooking and daily work. 3. A parent buys groceries online using a phone app. 4. Memory-recording glasses will save special memories. 5. Weather-control drones will keep cities cool. 6. People use smartwatches to check the time and their health.
Fill in the blanks in the paragraph with suitable linkers from: in the future, for example, however, nowadays, as a result.
exercises.answer: Nowadays, For example, As a result, In the future/However, As a result/However

exercises.problem: Read the paragraph again and complete the table: Type of Sentence → Write Your Sentence. Topic Sentence: ___. Supporting Detail 1: ___. Supporting Detail 2: ___. Concluding Sentence: ___.
exercises.answer: Topic: Nowadays, technology is a big part of our everyday life. Supporting 1: Students attend virtual classes and families buy groceries using apps. Supporting 2: Robots and AI will help people at home. Concluding: People should still use technology carefully.

exercises.problem: In groups, write one way technology helps people now and one way it will help them in the future. Discuss your ideas with your group. Now: ___. In the future: ___.

Plan and write a report of two paragraphs: Paragraph 1 — How technology helps people today. Paragraph 2 — How technology will change life in the future. Use the planning template (Introduction, Paragraph 1 topic/details/conclusion, Paragraph 2 topic/details/conclusion, Conclusion). Use the Paragraph Writing Checklist.

teaching_notes: Writing lesson comparing technology now and in the future. Read and Sort exercise distinguishes present (N) and future (F) statements. Language Focus: 'Nowadays' and 'in the future' as time linkers. Linker Bank: because, also, first, finally, therefore, in addition, for example, next, so, as a result. Model paragraph with linker gaps. Paragraph analysis table. Group brainstorming then individual two-paragraph report. Paragraph Writing Checklist includes: interesting opening sentence, new words from unit, punctuation/capitals, AI proofreading, suitable linkers, clear paragraph endings, correct spelling, present simple for now + will for future. Page 64 contains planning template. 2 pages.
